data.title: XRP Price Forecast: Analysts Divided Amid Bearish Signals
data.description:
A former XRP enthusiast has issued a warning about a potential decline in XRP prices, pointing to a technical pattern reminiscent of Cardano's pre-crash consolidation. According to NS3.AI, despite the current bearish indicators and consolidation near its 2018 highs, some institutions, including Standard Chartered, maintain a positive outlook. They predict XRP could reach $8 by 2026, driven by ETF inflows and decreased exchange liquidity.

Analysts are split on XRP's future, with price predictions ranging from below $1.50 in a bearish scenario to as high as $8 in a bullish one. This highlights the market's reliance on demand dynamics and forthcoming catalysts.

data.title: Amazon struggles to meet satellite deadline, seeks two-year extension
data.description:
The retail giant has petitioned federal regulators for additional time to get its space-based internet project off the ground, citing problems securing enough rocket launches to meet an upcoming deadline. Amazon told the Federal Communications Commission on Friday that it needs an extension to deploy approximately 1,600 satellites by a July 2026 cutoff date. The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/amazon-struggles-to-meet-satellite-deadline/

data.title: X Enhances Creator Revenue Shares Following Crackdown on Bot Accounts
data.description: Nikita Bier, Product Lead at X and Solana advisor, revealed that the platform's recent increase in creator revenue shares is attributed to a crackdown on matrix and bot accounts. According to NS3.AI, the targeted accounts included those with AI-generated profile pictures, traffic redirection links, and non-compliant interactive content. This initiative has led to a more equitable distribution of revenue among legitimate creators on X.

data.title: Gold and Silver Prices Drop Amid Speculation of New Federal Reserve Chair
data.description: Gold and silver prices experienced a significant decline following reports that Kevin Warsh is likely to be nominated as the new Federal Reserve Chair. According to NS3.AI, Warsh's hawkish reputation indicates a reduced risk of a weaker US dollar, contributing to the sell-off. Analysts also point to month-end profit-taking and banking hedging operations as factors in the price drop. The decrease in base metals such as copper, which lacks retail investor involvement, indicates that the movement extends beyond just retail investor reactions.

data.title: Experts warn data center backlash threatens AI growth, urges community agreements
data.description:
Brookings warned that local resistance to data centers threatened AI infrastructure growth nationwide across America.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/experts-data-center-backlash-threatens-ai/

data.description: According to MLM monitoring, a wallet suspected to be Multicoin Capital purchased 1.355 million HYPE tokens last week, worth approximately $40.8 million.

data.title: OKX Star responded to CZ: We will no longer waste time discussing the "1011 flash crash" topic; Dragonfly has never invested in OKX.
data.description: OKX Star retweeted a screenshot of CZ's tweet on the X platform and stated that he dislikes debate because you can never wake someone who is pretending to be asleep, but clarifying the facts is crucial: 1. Bitcoin began to fall approximately 30 minutes before the dollar decoupled from Bitcoin. This confirms the previous point: the initial move caused the market shock. Without the leveraged cycle of the dollar index, the market would likely have stabilized at that point. The chain sell-off was not inevitable; as previously stated, it was amplified by structural leverage. 2. Dragonfly has never invested in OKX, neither in small nor large amounts. 3. He will no longer waste time discussing the "1011 flash crash" topic; the facts are clear, and he doesn't want a lengthy debate.

data.title: Multicoin Capital Wallet Acquires 1.355 Million HYPE Tokens
data.description: A wallet suspected to belong to Multicoin Capital recently purchased 1.355 million HYPE tokens. According to Odaily, the acquisition is valued at approximately $40.8 million. The transaction was monitored by MLM, highlighting significant activity in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Product Manager X: Creator reward revenue sharing increased due to crackdown on botnets and "paid troll" accounts.
data.description: Nikita Bier, X Product Manager and Solana Consultant, responded to the recent significant increase in creator reward revenue sharing on the X platform. He stated that the increase in creator reward revenue sharing on the X platform is mainly due to the recent crackdown on matrix accounts and "water army" accounts, including setting AI avatars, placing referral links for tips in bios, and containing non-compliant interactive content in tweets.

data.title: Analysts: Gold and silver experienced a "Wash shock," with profit-taking and hedging activities potentially fueling the sell-off.
data.description: The plunge in gold and silver prices this Friday began with reports that Trump would nominate Warsh as the new chairman of the Federal Reserve. Dirk Malaki, managing director of SLC Management, stated that Warsh's hawkish background reduces the risk of a broad-based depreciation of the dollar. The market is returning to an orderly monetary policy track. Analysts also noted that traders taking profits quickly at the end of the month, or banks hedging against the impact of a sudden drop, may have contributed to the precious metals sell-off. Adrian Ash, head of research at BullionVault, said he has been involved in the precious metals market for 20 years and has never seen anything like it. However, he downplayed the possibility of retail investors suddenly withdrawing funds on Friday, pointing to similar unusual movements in base metals markets such as copper, where copper futures fell 4.5% on Friday. Ash also stated that looking only at gold and silver, it's easy to say this is retail frenzy, but there is no retail participation in the base metals market. (Jinshi)

data.title: The privacy protocol PRIVA will be available for trading on February 10th, coinciding with the start of its public beta test.
data.description: According to official news, PRIVA, the privacy-driven RWA infrastructure, will officially launch trading on February 10th. Simultaneously, its core product, the Privacy Protocol, will also be open for public beta testing. PRIVA aims to address the privacy challenges of on-chaining RWA assets through zero-knowledge proof technology. The official announcement states that all transaction fees generated during the Privacy Protocol's public beta will be allocated to a "dividend pool" and a "buyback pool" to incentivize node holders and implement token deflation and burning.

data.title: Indonesia Appoints Interim and Executive Heads for Capital Market Regulation
data.description: Indonesia's Financial Services Authority has announced new appointments within its regulatory framework. According to Jin10, Frederica Widyasari Dewi has been named the interim head of the capital market, while Hasan Fawzi will serve as the executive head. These appointments are part of ongoing efforts to strengthen the country's financial regulatory system and ensure effective oversight of its capital markets.

data.title: NEO Founders Resolve Dispute, Focus on Financial Report Preparation
data.description:
On January 31, NEO founder Da Hongfei announced that he and co-founder Erik Zhang have agreed to cease their ongoing dispute, which has been detrimental to both NEO and its community. According to BlockBeats, the founders are currently focused on preparing a financial report, aiming to release a comprehensive preview by February 15. This preview will offer detailed information for financial verification, budget planning, and governance reform, with regular updates expected before the final version is published.

Previously, the two NEO founders had a falling out, with Da Hongfei accused of failing to fulfill financial disclosure commitments and Erik Zhang alleged to have monopolized the foundation's financial authority.

data.description: The countdown for verifiable finance has commenced on the Nexus platform, according to Foresight News. Nexus announced this development via a tweet, which included a video featuring the date 'March 17.'

data.title: AI Agents' Networking Raises Security Concerns
data.description: AI agents are increasingly using relay protocols to network and communicate, leading to potential security risks. According to NS3.AI, these connections create viral pathways that can spread unsafe configurations and facilitate attacks. Thousands of exposed control panels and leaked credentials have made these systems appealing targets, with some agents even offering Bitcoin bounties for discovering exploits. The industry is facing three potential scenarios in the next 90 days: enhanced security measures, increased exploitation, or stricter platform regulations on agent distribution.

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. US SEC: Currently operating according to the plan during the shutdown; 2. Ripple co-founders Chris Larsen and Tim Draper's "Grow California" received a $40 million donation pledge; 3. Santiment: Market sentiment hit a year-to-date low, institutional positioning shows long-term confidence remains strong, releasing bullish signals; 4. Caixin: Beijing man sentenced to 3 years and 10 months in prison for participating in a US "pig butchering" money laundering scheme, ordered to pay 187 million yuan in compensation; 5. US government enters technical shutdown, Bitcoin falls below $83,000, triggering market vigilance and increased volatility next week; 6. "ETH held for 4 years, switching to WBTC": A whale converted $9.06 million worth of WETH into WBTC; 7. "$230 million in funds opened long positions": A whale's ETH long position is only $350 away from the liquidation price; 8. Silver plunge impacts cryptocurrency leveraged trading, Hyperliquid experiences tens of millions of dollars in liquidations; 9. 10. A whale transferred 2.493 million UNI tokens to Binance 10 hours ago, worth over $10 million; 10. Jupiter's requirement to import mnemonic phrases to claim ASR rewards sparked community opposition, and it is expected that other wallets will be able to apply within 1-2 weeks; 11. Analysis: Warsh will not be influenced by the White House and will maintain a certain balance between the Fed's dual mandate; 12. Analysis: Multiple factors triggered a record-breaking plunge in international precious metal prices; 13. Hong Kong police arrested two suspects in a 58 million yen money exchange robbery; 14. Toly: The October 11 crash may kick off an 18-month bear market, a "lucky time" to build new products; 15. Polymarket and Kalshi disagreed due to definitional differences, and the US government shutdown highlighted the "definition accuracy" problem of prediction markets.

data.title: A newly created wallet spent $44.99 million to buy HYPE three days ago and then sold it, incurring a loss of $3.72 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet "0x9D2" bought HYPE for $44.99 million and then sold it all for $41.27 million, losing $3.72 million in three days.

data.description:
